title: The Wife of Spain’s Leader Is Accused of Graft. It May Actually Help Him.
summary_full: People close to Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez keep being investigated for corruption. Analysts say weaknesses in the latest case could help him discredit the others.
summary_public: People close to Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez keep being investigated for corruption. Analysts say weaknesses in the latest case could help him discredit the others.
